subcodes.first_line: O thou who art turned towards God! Thou hast entered beneath the shadow of the Divine Word and art illumined by the manifest lights from the Dayspring of the love of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه الی الله در ظل کلمه الهیه داخل شدی و از مطلع محبه الله بانوار مبین
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @praise and encouragement
